game_name: Glory of Heracles III: Silence of the Gods

special_mechanics.name: Immortality Power
special_mechanics.description: Hero acquires mysterious power that shields from bodily harm, making him functionally immortal. Enables unique actions like jumping from high cliffs without injury.

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative) - RPG title with limited movement physics documentation. Only qualitative description available: immortality mechanic allowing unrestricted fall damage. No quantitative movement parameters documented in sources.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Glory of Heracles series article
